assertions.title: Detail metadata preserves the selected source and rooted path

steps.action: Opened the marketplace `shared-skill` row from the native Claude list.
steps.expected: Detail stays on the marketplace observation and shows a path rooted under `~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/...`.
steps.observed: The drawer header stayed on `shared-skill` with subtitle `Marketplace source duplicate`; the sidebar showed `市场来源` / `只读来源` plus file, directory, and source-root paths under `/tmp/skills-manage-test-fixtures/claude-multi-source/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/marketplace-a/...`.

steps.expected: Detail updates to the user observation and shows a path rooted under `~/.claude/skills/...`.
steps.observed: The drawer switched to subtitle `User source duplicate`; the sidebar showed `用户来源` plus file, directory, and source-root paths under `/tmp/skills-manage-test-fixtures/claude-multi-source/.claude/skills/...`.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude detail flow on the native Tauri surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Marketplace detail visibly communicates read-only status

steps.action: Inspected the source-status panel for the marketplace `shared-skill` detail drawer.
steps.expected: The detail view explicitly communicates read-only/display-only treatment, not just missing controls.
steps.observed: The sidebar showed both `市场来源` and `只读来源` badges plus the explanatory message `市场托管副本仅供查看，不能在这里安装、卸载或调整技能集。`.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude detail flow on the native Tauri surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Marketplace detail blocks install and uninstall actions

steps.action: Reviewed the install-status area for the marketplace `shared-skill` row.
steps.expected: No enabled install or uninstall action is available from marketplace detail.
steps.observed: The install-status section rendered read-only text (`市场来源的只读副本不可安装或卸载。`) and no enabled install/uninstall control appeared anywhere in the drawer.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.

steps.action: Opened the user-source `shared-skill` row after the marketplace duplicate.
steps.expected: The ordinary Claude user row keeps its normal management affordances.
steps.observed: The user detail showed `用户来源`, user-rooted metadata under `.claude/skills`, visible install status icons for supported platforms, and the matching native validation run recorded the `加入技能集` button as enabled on the same user row.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.

assertions.title: Switching between duplicate rows updates the entire detail state

steps.action: Opened the marketplace `shared-skill` row and switched to the AI Explanation tab.
steps.expected: The detail surface should reflect the marketplace row only.
steps.observed: The drawer showed marketplace subtitle/source badges, marketplace-rooted metadata, blocked install/collection semantics, and marketplace-only AI explanation text: `市场来源解释：只应在市场行出现。`.

steps.action: Closed that drawer, opened the user `shared-skill` row, and switched to the AI Explanation tab.
steps.expected: The entire detail surface should update to the user row with no leaked marketplace state.
steps.observed: The drawer switched to user subtitle/source badge, user-rooted metadata, visible install controls, and user-only AI explanation text: `用户来源解释：只应在用户行出现。`; the prior marketplace explanation and read-only semantics did not leak.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude detail flow on the native Tauri surface and did not require network requests.

steps.action: Started from the native Claude list showing both duplicate `shared-skill` rows.
steps.expected: Selecting each duplicate opens detail for that exact row instead of merging sources.
steps.observed: The list kept separate marketplace and user `shared-skill` rows with distinct badges; opening the marketplace row produced marketplace-rooted read-only detail, and opening the user row produced user-rooted manageable detail.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude detail flow on the native Tauri surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Marketplace rows stay outside management semantics everywhere

steps.action: Reviewed the marketplace `shared-skill` row in the Claude list and then in detail.
steps.expected: Marketplace rows remain read-only on both list and detail surfaces with no management path available anywhere.
steps.observed: In the list, the marketplace row showed `市场来源` and `只读` badges and lacked the user row's management affordance. In detail, install and collection sections were replaced with read-only explanatory text and no management control was exposed.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated Claude detail flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite startup log at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude detail flow on the native Tauri surface and did not require network requests.

frictions.description: The native detail screenshots for this isolated manual-tauri fixture had already been captured earlier in the milestone, and re-driving the serialized native window would have added avoidable churn.
frictions.resolution: Reused those existing native `screencapture` images, then cross-checked them against the still-healthy isolated app on `http://localhost:24200`, the live native process, and the existing duplicate-row list evidence before grading the assertions.

summary: Tested 8 assigned Claude detail/navigation assertions against the isolated native Tauri surface. All 8 passed: marketplace `shared-skill` detail preserved marketplace-rooted read-only metadata and blocked management, the user duplicate preserved user-rooted manageable state, switching between duplicates updated the full detail surface including AI explanation content, and marketplace rows stayed outside management semantics on both list and detail views.
